topicDefinition.oneLiner: Affordable AI video generators that deliver professional results without breaking the bank.
boundaries: Must offer robust paid plans that cost less than $20 per month.
Must allow watermark-free video exports on these affordable tiers.
Excludes platforms where the base plan is cheap but crucial features (like 1080p export) are locked behind $30+ tiers.

howToChoose.title: Evaluate the Credit System
howToChoose.desc: A $10/month plan might seem cheap, but if a single 5-second generation costs 20% of your monthly credits, it's not truly affordable. Always calculate the cost per video minute.

howToChoose.title: Check Watermark Policies
howToChoose.desc: Some tools advertise cheap plans but force you to retain their watermark unless you upgrade to the 'Pro' tier. Ensure the sub-$20 plan includes watermark removal.

howToChoose.title: Consider Pay-Per-Use (API) Alternatives
howToChoose.desc: If you don't generate videos daily, skipping subscriptions altogether and using API-driven platforms on a pay-per-render basis can be significantly cheaper.

sources.title: Best AI video generators under $20 a month
sources.excerpt: A deep dive comparing the credit economics of the cheapest paid tiers across major AI video platforms.

sections.heading: Top Affordable Options
sections.content: Kling AI (~$10/month) offers the best quality-to-price ratio for regular use. The Standard plan provides 660 credits. Pika Labs ($8-10/month) is beginner-friendly. Runway Gen-4 (~$15/month) Standard plan unlocks 625 credits.

toolMentions.bestFor: High-quality motion and physics on a budget
keyClaims: Offers the best quality-to-price ratio for regular use
Excellent motion coherence, physics simulation, and lip-sync
pricingClaims: Provides 660 credits for several 5-10 second 1080p videos
proofSnippets: Kling AI (~$10/month) - Offers the best quality-to-price ratio for regular use. The Standard plan provides 660 credits for several 5-10 second 1080p videos.

toolMentions.bestFor: Social media content with fast generations
proofSnippets: Pika Labs ($8-10/month) - Beginner-friendly option with generous credits for punchy, creative clips.

notes: Highly relevant article specifically focused on the sub-$20 price point.

sources.title: Runway AI Official Pricing
sources.excerpt: Official pricing and watermark policies for Runway's entry-level subscriptions.

sections.heading: Standard Plan
sections.content: Runway's Standard plan costs $12/month per user (billed annually) and includes 625 monthly credits.

sections.heading: Watermark Removal
sections.content: Watermark removal is available on the Standard plan and higher tiers.

toolMentions.bestFor: Advanced editing flexibility and Director Mode
keyClaims: Access to all video generation models including Gen-4.5, Gen-4, and Gen-4 Turbo
Supports up to 5 users per workspace
pricingClaims: Standard plan costs $12/month per user (billed annually at $144)
watermarkRules: Standard plan ($12/mo) removes watermarks from generated videos
limitations: Monthly credit cap applies (625 credits); requires $76/mo Unlimited tier for infinite generations
proofSnippets: Runway's Standard plan costs $12/month per user (billed annually at $144) and includes 625 monthly credits. This plan removes watermarks from generated videos.

notes: Verified that Runway fits the under-$20 constraint if billed annually.

sources.title: 6 Best AI Video Tools for Daily Content Creators on a Budget
sources.excerpt: An evaluation of fast, affordable AI video platforms for daily uploaders.

sections.heading: Top Affordable Options
sections.content: Magic Hour (~$12/month) - Built for daily short-form video creation with fast text-to-video and image-to-video generation.

toolMentions.bestFor: Daily short-form video creation without complex panels
keyClaims: Built for daily short-form video creation
exportRules: Strong output quality for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts
proofSnippets: Magic Hour (~$12/month) - Built for daily short-form video creation with fast text-to-video and image-to-video generation.

notes: Provides a lesser-known but highly targeted tool for the budget social media demographic.
